sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH cte AS (
    SELECT
        LandingzoneEntityId,
        FilePath,
        FileName,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY LandingzoneEntityId
            ORDER BY InsertDateTime ASC
        ) AS rn
    FROM execution.PipelineLandingzoneEntity
)

SELECT
    CONCAT(
        '[',
        STRING_AGG(
            CONVERT(
                NVARCHAR(MAX),
                CONCAT(
                    '{"path": "NB_FMD_PURVIEW_LINEAGE_TABLE_COLUMN", "params":{',

                    '"BrzTableSchema01" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [BrzTableSchema01]), 'json'), '",',
                    '"SlvTableSchema01" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [SlvTableSchema01]), 'json'), '",',
                    '"LdzFileName01" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [LdzFileName01]), 'json'), '",',
                    '"BrzTableName01" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [BrzTableName01]), 'json'), '",',
                    '"SlvTableName01" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [SlvTableName01]), 'json'), '",',
                     '"SourceFileName" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [SourceFileName]), 'json'), '",',

                    '"LdzWorkspace" : "', LOWER(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(36), [LdzWorkspaceId])), '",',
                    '"BrzWorkspace" : "', LOWER(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(36), [BrzWorkspaceId])), '",',
                    '"SlvWorkspace" : "', LOWER(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(36), [SlvWorkspaceId])), '",',
                    
                    '"LdzLakehouse" : "', LOWER(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(36), [LdzLakehouseId])), '",',
                    '"BrzLakehouse" : "', LOWER(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(36), [BrzLakehouseId])), '",',
                    '"SlvLakehouse" : "', LOWER(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(36), [SlvLakehouseId])), '",',
                                        
                    '"LdzWorkspaceName" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [LdzWorkspaceName]), 'json'), '",',
                    '"BrzWorkspaceName" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [BrzWorkspaceName]), 'json'), '",',
                    '"SlvWorkspaceName" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [SlvWorkspaceName]), 'json'), '",',
                    '"LdzLakehouseName" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [LdzLakehouseName]), 'json'), '",',
                    '"BrzLakehouseName" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [BrzLakehouseName]), 'json'), '",',
                    '"SlvLakehouseName" : "', STRING_ESCAPE(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), [SlvLakehouseName]), 'json'), '"',

                    '}}'
                )
            ),
            ', '
        ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY [BrzTableName01], [SlvTableName01]),
        ']'
    ) AS NotebookParams
FROM
(
    SELECT
        DS.Namespace AS BrzTableSchema01,
        DS.Namespace AS SlvTableSchema01,
        concat(cte.FilePath,'/',cte.FileName) as LdzFileName01,
        cte.FileName as SourceFileName,
        CONCAT(BLE.[Schema], '_', BLE.[Name]) AS BrzTableName01,
        CONCAT(SLE.[Schema], '_', SLE.[Name]) AS SlvTableName01,
        WL.[WorkspaceGuid] AS LdzWorkspaceId,
        WB.[WorkspaceGuid] AS BrzWorkspaceId,
        WS.[WorkspaceGuid] AS SlvWorkspaceId,
        LLH.[LakehouseGuid] AS LdzLakehouseId,
        BLH.[LakehouseGuid] AS BrzLakehouseId,
        SLH.[LakehouseGuid] AS SlvLakehouseId,
        LLH.[Name] AS LdzLakehouseName,
        BLH.[Name] AS BrzLakehouseName,
        SLH.[Name] AS SlvLakehouseName,
        WL.[Name] AS LdzWorkspaceName,
        WB.[Name] AS BrzWorkspaceName,
        WS.[Name] AS SlvWorkspaceName
    FROM [integration].[SilverLayerEntity] SLE
    INNER JOIN [integration].[BronzeLayerEntity] BLE
        ON SLE.BronzeLayerEntityId = BLE.BronzeLayerEntityId
    INNER JOIN [integration].[LandingzoneEntity] LZE
        ON LZE.LandingzoneEntityId = BLE.LandingzoneEntityId
    LEFT JOIN cte ON CTE.LandingzoneEntityId = LZE.LandingzoneEntityId
    INNER JOIN [integration].[DataSource] DS
        ON DS.[DataSourceId] = LZE.[DataSourceId]
    INNER JOIN [integration].[Lakehouse] LLH
        ON LZE.LakehouseId = LLH.LakehouseId
    INNER JOIN [integration].[Lakehouse] BLH
        ON BLE.LakehouseId = BLH.LakehouseId
    INNER JOIN [integration].[Lakehouse] SLH
        ON SLE.LakehouseId = SLH.LakehouseId
    INNER JOIN [integration].[Workspace] WL
        ON WL.[WorkspaceGuid] = LLH.[WorkspaceGuid]
    INNER JOIN [integration].[Workspace] WB
        ON WB.[WorkspaceGuid] = BLH.[WorkspaceGuid]
    INNER JOIN [integration].[Workspace] WS
        ON WS.[WorkspaceGuid] = SLH.[WorkspaceGuid]
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND LZE.IsActive = 1
        AND BLE.IsActive = 1
        AND SLE.IsActive = 1
        AND  WL.[WorkspaceGuid]='@{pipeline().parameters.Data_WorkspaceGuid}'
		AND cte.rn=1
) AS Input;
